macro.title: China says it will reverse major AI acquisition by Meta - The Washington Post
macro.summary: The move against Manus AI is Beijing’s most aggressive step yet to stanch the loss of AI talent to the United States, setting up a complicated legal and political fight.

macro.title: Elon Musk and OpenAI CEO Sam Altman head to court in high-stakes showdown over AI - AP News
macro.summary: Technology tycoons Elon Musk and Sam Altman are poised to face off in a high-stakes trial revolving around the alleged betrayal, deceit and unbridled ambition that blurred the bickering billionaires’ once-shared vision for the development of artificial intell…

macro.title: Stock Market Today: Dow Dips But Nvidia Gains; Google Stock, Chemicals Play Test Entries (Live Coverage) - Investor's Business Daily
macro.summary: The Dow Jones index falls Monday. Intel rises but chip stocks lag. Google parent Alphabet clears an entry on the stock market today.

macro.title: Google workers petition CEO to refuse classified AI work with Pentagon - The Washington Post
macro.summary: Hundreads of Google employees wrote in a letter to CEO Sundar Pichai that they did not want to see its AI technology used in “inhumane or extremely harmful ways.”
